---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: 'feat: '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see.

## Problem / Motivation

What problem does this solve? Who benefits from it?

Example: _"As a self-hoster, I want to ... so that ..."_

## Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you'd like. Be as specific as possible.

## Alternatives Considered

List any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Additional Context

Add any other context, mockups, or screenshots here.
